articles.title: Joint team inspects petrol pumps in Khrew
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent SRINAGAR, June 18: A joint team of police and the Legal Metrology Department today conducted an inspection of petrol pumps in the Khrew area of Pulwama district to ensure transparency and protect consumer interests. A spokesperson said the...

articles.title: As Iran Deal Kicks In, US Gas Prices Dip Below $4 For 1st Time Since March
articles.description: The average US price for a gallon of gas fell below $4 on Thursday, hitting a level not seen since the first full month of the war with Iran and providing a bit of relief to consumers squeezed by soaring costs.

articles.title: Democrats won’t let dropping gas prices stop them from hammering Trump on affordability
articles.description: President’s opponents are hoping voters remember who caused prices to go up in the first place, Eric Garcia writes

articles.title: Business sector welcomes Iran pact
articles.description: Businesses and economists took a deep breath after the US and Iran signed off on a deal to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, lifting optimism as oil prices fell, which could ease inflation and support potential economic growth.

articles.title: Donald Trump attacks Iran ceasefire critics as stocks surge and oil prices tumble
articles.description: Donald Trump has lashed out at critics of his Iran peace deal, as he points to record stock market highs and tumbling oil prices as proof the agreement is working.

articles.title: US gas prices dip below $4 for 1st time since March but remain 25% higher than last year
articles.description: U.S. gas prices have fallen to just below $4 a gallon on average, bringing some relief to drivers who have seen soaring costs amid Washington’s war with Iran

articles.title: Traffic flows through Hormuz as U.S.-Iran deal takes effect, but questions remain
articles.description: Oil tankers sailed through the Strait of Hormuz and the United States said it lifted its blockade on Iran on Thursday as an interim deal ‌to end the war took effect, though key issues are still unresolved between the two countries. articles.title: Oil Prices Fall To 3-Month Lows On U.S.-Iran Deal
articles.description: Oil prices fell to three-month lows after the U.S. and Iran signalled that a long awaited deal to end hostilities in Middle East had been signed.
